channel.title: Javascript on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Javascript on My Blog

item.title: react-querty
item.description:
React Query

React Query is a library that simplifies data fetching and management in React applications.

Features

. Decerlative Data fetching . Automatic Caching . Automatic background data refetching . Error handling and retry strategies

Key components

1 - QueryClientProvider -> The top level component wraps our React application, providing our application a global context of the query client instance

import { QueryClientProvider } from 'react-query'; function App() { return ( <QueryClientProvider> {/* Your application components */} </QueryClientProvider> ); }

item.title: react-querty
item.description:
React Query

React Query is a library that simplifies data fetching and management in React applications.

Features

. Decerlative Data fetching . Automatic Caching . Automatic background data refetching . Error handling and retry strategies

Key components

1 - QueryClientProvider -> The top level component wraps our React application, providing our application a global context of the query client instance

import { QueryClientProvider } from 'react-query'; function App() { return ( <QueryClientProvider> {/* Your application components */} </QueryClientProvider> ); }
